data.body: Landed + verified: change 731 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/731, commit a7ea420b8) got LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 (CI run 29467397310), submitted -> MERGED to main. RED->GREEN: the added PEP503 regression test failed pre-fix (reproducing 'jaraco.classes ABSENT') and passes post-fix; 7/7 test_check_build_env_locked green; lint+typecheck clean. Proof the fix unblocks releases: the re-dispatched release run 29468059472 'Build distributions (build-once)' job PASSED the env-lock guard (previously failed) and the full release completed (PyPI 0.8.0 published).
